creator: adrik@salesmanager.nl
text:
That does not work!
When I add the line to /etc/make.conf and try to install sid-milter, it =
goes looking for libmilter.so.4, which does not exist.
Then it tried to install the sendmail-sasl port, which fails, because it =
is already installed.
The only difference is it tries to install the sendmail-sasl port =
instead of the sendmail port.

This output of making the sid-milter port:

mail# make
=3D=3D=3D>   sid-milter-1.0.0 depends on file: =
/usr/local/lib/libmilter.so.4 - not found
=3D=3D=3D>    Verifying install for /usr/local/lib/libmilter.so.4 in =
/usr/ports/mail/sendmail-sasl
=3D=3D=3D>  Installing for sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.14.7
=3D=3D=3D>   sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.14.7 depends on file: =
/usr/local/sbin/saslauthd - found
=3D=3D=3D>   sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.14.7 depends on shared library: sasl2 =
- found
if ! pw groupshow smmsp; then pw groupadd smmsp -g 25; fi
smmsp:*:25:
if ! pw usershow smmsp; then pw useradd smmsp -g smmsp -u 25  -h - -d =
/nonexistent -s /nonexistent -c "Sendmail Queue"; fi
smmsp:*:25:25::0:0:Sendmail Submission =
User:/var/spool/clientmqueue:/usr/sbin/nologin
=3D=3D=3D>   Generating temporary packing list
=3D=3D=3D>  Checking if mail/sendmail-sasl already installed
=3D=3D=3D>   sendmail+tls+sasl2-8.14.7 is already installed
      You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
      by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
      If you really wish to overwrite the old port of mail/sendmail-sasl
      without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
      in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** [check-already-installed] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/sendmail-sasl.
*** [build-depends] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/sid-milter.

-----Original Message-----
From: dinoex@FreeBSD.org [mailto:dinoex@FreeBSD.org]
Sent: Mon 13-May-13 16:01
To: Adri Koppes; dinoex@FreeBSD.org; dinoex@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/178048: Milter installations failwhen sendmail is =
installed from ports
=20
Synopsis: Milter installations failwhen sendmail is installed from ports

State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
State-Changed-By: dinoex
State-Changed-When: Mon May 13 15:59:47 CEST 2013
State-Changed-Why:=20

please add the following line to your /etc/make.conf:

SENDMAIL_MILTER_PORT=3Dsendmail-sasl


http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D178048
